ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the film */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the film in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the film */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the film */,
  "overall_eval" INTEGER /* Overall evaluation score of the film */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film's distributor */,
  "rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the film */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the film's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the film's poster */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the film */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date production ended */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the film was released */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Name of the film's distributor */,
  "country_of_production" TEXT /* Country where the film was produced */,
  "is_3d" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film is in 3D */,
  "is_imax" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film is in IMAX */,
  "is_digital" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film is available in digital format */,
  "is_physical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film is available in physical format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Director's birth date */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Director's place of birth */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Director's biography */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Director's nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_directors" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the company's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_production_companies" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "neutral_votes" INTEGER /* Number of neutral votes received */,
  "negative_votes" INTEGER /* Number of negative votes received */,
  "percentage_of_positive_reviews" REAL /* Percentage of positive reviews given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating (1-5 stars) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* User's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "opening_weekend" REAL /* Box office earnings during the opening weekend */,
  "total_gross" REAL /* Total box office earnings */,
  "domestic_gross" REAL /* Domestic box office earnings */,
  "international_gross" REAL /* International box office earnings */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the film opened in theaters */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the film closed in theaters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_languages" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken in the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "language")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the distributor was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the distributor's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the distributor's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_distributors" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "distributor_id")
)
